org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.

    JpqlQueryBuilder.WhereStep.lt(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value)
    Create a less < … predicate.

    JpqlQueryBuilder.WhereStep.lte(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value)
    Create a less-or-equals <= … predicate.

    Create a MEMBER OF &lt;collection&gt; predicate.

    Create a &lt;&gt; (not equals) predicate.

    Create a NOT IN predicate.
